Index.title: Home
Index.heroDesc: Research smarter, reason clearly, and organize your legal knowledge. Built for law students and professionals.
Index.featuresTitle: Everything you need to research the law
Index.featuresDesc: Powerful features designed for legal minds, made simple for everyone.
Index.useCasesDesc: Whether you're a student or professional, LexAI adapts to you.
Index.ctaDesc: Join thousands of law students and professionals already using LexAI.
Index.feature1Desc: Ask complex legal questions and receive structured, sourced answers.
Index.feature2Desc: Organize your legal research into structured notes with categories and tags.
Index.feature3Desc: Build a personal library of legal knowledge. Search and filter instantly.
Index.feature4Desc: Clear distinction between facts, legal principles, and assumptions.
Index.useCase1Desc: Simplify case analysis, organize lecture notes, and research faster.
Index.useCase2Desc: Streamline research workflows and extract key points from documents.
Index.useCase3Desc: Understand your legal rights and get structured explanations.
